content:
Mozilla connect is the best place to promote your ideas and make feature suggestions.

The TB team take these into consideration when planning features and roadmaps. Those with higher votes have a greater chance of being prioritised for development.

The idea below is similar to your own and open to votes and comments. https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/thunderbird-android-move-controls-to-bottom/idi-p/82222
creator: platform34
